raw_consumer_statement:
I am disputing an incomplete refund related to a returned purchase from XXXX XXXX that was charged to my Citi credit card. 

The total return amount was {$930.00}, which should have been refunded in full. However, I only received two refunds of {$310.00} each, for a total of {$620.00}. The remaining {$310.00} was never refunded to my credit card account. 

After unsuccessfully attempting to resolve this issue with the merchant ( XXXX XXXX ), I filed a dispute with Citi. In late XX/XX/XXXX, Citi issued a provisional credit of {$310.00} for the missing refund amount. 

However, in early XX/XX/XXXX, Citi reversed/removed the provisional credit without providing any evidence that the third refund of {$310.00} was ever completed or settled to my account. At no point have I received the missing {$310.00} refund, nor have I been provided with a transaction record, settlement confirmation, or refund trace number showing that the funds were returned. 

This dispute concerns a refund that was promised but never received, and the amount remains outstanding. I have attached the order details from the XXXX XXXX website, the return submission confirmation, and three return shipping labels, each corresponding to a refund amount of {$310.00} ( total {$930.00} ). Tracking records show that all three packages were delivered to XXXX XXXX return facility. 

Despite all three return packages being received by the merchant, I only received two refunds of {$310.00} each. The third refund of {$310.00} was never credited to my Citi credit card account.
